settings.heading: Collector FAQ
settings.text: Clear answers on editions, shipping, archive status, and release structure.

settings.question: How often do new drops release?
settings.answer: Render-Lab drops follow an irregular release rhythm. Join the archive list for advance windows.

settings.question: Will sold-out editions return?
settings.answer: Most limited editions do not restock. Archived works remain visible for collector reference.

settings.question: How are works packaged?
settings.answer: All shipments use reinforced packaging with tracked delivery to protect collector pieces in transit.
